name: brainstorm.openWhiteboard
description: Open or reuse a brainstorm whiteboard for the current session. Creates a collaborative canvas tied to the brainstorm topic and returns the room URL for human participants.

topic.description: Brainstorm topic or prompt for the session.

session_id.description: Brainstorm session ID (optional, uses session when available).

phase.description: Optional brainstorm phase, such as diverge, explore, or converge.

metadata.description: Optional metadata to store with the brainstorm room.

project_id.description: Project ID for scoping (optional, uses session).

org_id.description: Organization ID for scoping (optional, uses session).

room_url.description: URL to the whiteboard room in the web console (AMPREALIZE_CONSOLE_URL/whiteboard/{room_id}). Share this link with human participants.
